title: BIHIYII Pink Wrapping Paper Roll 43 cm x 10 m, Pearlescent Gift Wrapping Paper with Pearly Lustre Sparkle, Solid Color Matte Gifts Wrap for Birthday Christmas Wedding (Pink)
features: Warm Tip: This wrapping roll is made of premium thick paper, it's recommended to use double-sided adhesive tape for packaging to have a good looking, transparent sellotape is not sticky enough
Size: 17 inches x 393.7 inches / 43 cm x 10m (Width at 43cm, about half the length of a standard roll of gift wrap), suitable for medium and small gifts
Pearlescent Wrapping Paper Roll: Matte with a pearly finish, classy and elegant, pearly lustre sparkle paper wrap can make your gifts look more beautiful, unique and stylish
No Creases: Comes in a roll form and wrapped in plastic shrink film, no folds or creases, make a perfect decoration for your gifts, stylish and simplistic

Versatile Gift Wrapping Paper: Simple and tasteful paper suitable for packaging gift boxes, bouquets, gift card bags on Birthday, Valentine's Day, Chrismas, shower, congrats, wedding, anniversary, party; Also great for craft projects, table coverings, art paper for arts and crafts
